prompt: Let's move on to Phase 7 (Tools & Sub-agents) -- start with the order-lookup tool. Use phased-project-builder.
assertions: Reads project-context/product-spec.md and project-context/addendum-notes-2026-07-08.md before or while building the order-lookup tool
Detects the contradiction between the two files (different base URL and different auth mechanism -- API key vs OAuth2 -- for the Order Management API)
Stops rather than silently picking one version of the API details and continuing to build the tool
Logs an issue entry in .project/ISSUES.md (and ISSUES.json) describing the contradiction, following the ISSUE-N template (severity, description, context, impact, suggested resolution)
Asks the user how to proceed rather than resolving the contradiction unilaterally
